attacking_style: Demonstrates versatility across long-range breakaways (200km+ efforts with 15min gaps) and time trial disciplines. Capable of exploiting GC opportunities through multi-day positioning rather than single explosive attacks.
team_tactics: Employed in dual-threat GC confusion tactics, creating multiple team leaders in top positions to complicate rival response. Functions beyond traditional domestique role when form permits.
terrain_preference: Excels in time trials (top-4 finishes) and sustained breakaway efforts requiring endurance over 200km. Best suited to GC racing requiring consistent performance rather than explosive climbing.
vulnerability: Final sprint execution from breakaways—demonstrated positioning skills but finished second when leading out sprint. May lack ultimate explosiveness in reduced group sprints.
key_patterns: Time trial strength creates GC opportunities: fourth and third in TT yielding top-4 GC
Deployed in team leader confusion tactics with multiple GC threats (top-3 GC placements)
Long-range breakaway endurance: sustained 200km+ efforts with double-digit time gaps
Sprint positioning skills exceed finishing power: led out but finished second
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 Dauphine showed GC capabilities (2nd overall, 4th in TT) suggesting elevation beyond domestique role compared to 2019 breakaway appearances
